# kemp_waf_custom_data (Resource)

Uploads a custom data file for the legacy commercial WAF engine.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_waf_custom_data" "bad_robots" {
  filename = "modsecurity_35_bad_robots.data"
  data     = base64encode(file("${path.module}/modsecurity_35_bad_robots.data"))
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String, Sensitive)
- `filename` (String)
